message: Everything the engine gives one AI runtime must exist for the other — its session hooks, helper servers, typed commands, review personas, and instruction floors are compared in both directions, and the only sanctioned differences are the committed entries of the provider-exception ledger (.engine/policies/provider-exceptions.json), each carrying a reason and its governing decision record. This check goes red on an unsanctioned one-runtime capability in either direction. To fix: add the missing counterpart (usually by regenerating the renders and re-applying the wiring), or record the difference in the ledger with a reason.
